wither_reincarnated.title: Encounter the Wither Reincarnated enhanced fight (Wither Reincarnated mod — multiple phases)

wither_eye_prep.title: Collect the Wither Eye after the Wither kill (dropped from Wither/Wither Reincarnated kill)

subtitle.text: The Wither fights in phases. You stay until the star drops.

description: Wither Reincarnated mod enhances the vanilla Wither fight
with new attack phases, projectile patterns, and movement behaviors.
The Wither Eye is an anchor eye — a direct drop from the Wither kill.
No custom recipe needed. The boss drops it.
It anchors the Nether dimension — every dimension the Wither crossed.
Place the Wither Eye in the portal frame.
That is three anchors accounted for:
Guardian Eye (ocean), Nether Eye (fortress), Wither Eye (void).
The three anchor eyes are the oldest confirmations.
They do not require civilization-scale boss chains.
They require presence at the places that pre-date civilization.
→ Collect the Wither Eye (anchor eye — direct drop) [check]
